ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event type */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Current status of the event (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of attendees the event can accommodate */,
  "registration_link" TEXT /* Link for event registration */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the event */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendees" (
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendee */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the attendee participated in */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the attendee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the attendee */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the attendee registered for the event */,
  "attendance_status" TEXT /* Attendance status of the attendee (e.g., registered, attended, no-show) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the attendee (e.g., unpaid, paid, pending) */,
  "ticket_type" TEXT /* Type of ticket purchased by the attendee (e.g., early bird, standard, VIP) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendees_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_statistics" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match statistic */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the match statistic belongs to */,
  "total_attendee" INTEGER /* Total number of attendees */,
  "total_direct_match" INTEGER /* Total number of direct matches */,
  "total_ngram_match" INTEGER /* Total number of n-gram matches */,
  "three_gram_match" REAL /* Percentage of 3-gram matches */,
  "three_gram_failure" REAL /* Percentage of 3-gram failures */,
  "two_gram_match" REAL /* Percentage of 2-gram matches */,
  "two_gram_failure" REAL /* Percentage of 2-gram failures */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date when the match statistics were last updated */,
  "success_rate" REAL /* Overall success rate of the matches */,
  "failure_rate" REAL /* Overall failure rate of the matches */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the match statistics */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the match statistics were created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the match statistics */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the match statistics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_statistics_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_statistics_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_statistics_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_details" (
  "match_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match detail */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match statistic the match detail belongs to */,
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attendee the match detail belongs to */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of the match (e.g., 3-gram, 2-gram) */,
  "match_value" REAL /* Value of the match */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score for the match */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the match detail */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the match detail was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the match detail */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the match detail was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_details_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES match_statistics ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_details_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_details_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_details_attendee_id FOREIGN KEY ("attendee_id") REFERENCES attendees ("attendee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "match_criteria" TEXT /* Specific match criteria for the event type */,
  "success_metrics" TEXT /* Specific success metrics for the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., event organizer, data analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the user account */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
